[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000 1
1 0000101 2
2 1001011 4
3 0000101 2
4 0000001 1
5 1001111 5
6 0110001 3
7 0000000 a

01 0001111 4
12 1111011 6
23 0110101 4
34 1101011 5
45 1011111 6
56 0110111 5
67 1101011 5
70 1110100 4
